sessionStart.bash: copilot plugin install https://dev.azure.com/msdata/A365/_git/copilot-toolkit 2>/dev/null || echo 'Plugin already installed or unavailable' >&2
sessionStart.powershell: try { copilot plugin install https://dev.azure.com/msdata/A365/_git/copilot-toolkit 2>$null } catch { Write-Host 'Plugin already installed or unavailable' -ForegroundColor Yellow }
